SEARCH
程序包 system

类 Notification

java.lang.Object
system.Notification
所有已实现的接口:
Serializable
public class Notification extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a notification message in the TA Management System.

Notifications are sent to users to inform them about important events such as application status changes, new applications, or system updates. Each notification has a recipient, title, content, type, and read status.

The class implements Serializable to support persistence via file storage.

从以下版本开始:
2026

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Notification

      public Notification(String notificationId, String recipientEmail, String title, String content, String type, String createTime, boolean read)
      Constructs a new Notification.
      参数:
      notificationId - unique identifier
      recipientEmail - recipient's email
      title - notification title
      content - notification content
      type - notification type
      createTime - creation timestamp
      read - initial read status

  • 方法详细资料

    • getNotificationId

      public String getNotificationId()
      Returns the notification ID.
      返回:
      the notification ID

    • getRecipientEmail

      public String getRecipientEmail()
      Returns the recipient's email.
      返回:
      the recipient email

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns the notification title.
      返回:
      the title

    • getContent

      public String getContent()
      Returns the notification content.
      返回:
      the content

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Returns the notification type.
      返回:
      the type

    • getCreateTime

      public String getCreateTime()
      Returns the creation timestamp.
      返回:
      the create time

    • isRead

      public boolean isRead()
      Returns whether the notification has been read.
      返回:
      true if read, false otherwise

    • setRead

      public void setRead(boolean read)
      Sets the read status.
      参数:
      read - the new read status

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this notification in CSV format.

      Format: notificationId,recipientEmail,title,content,type,createTime,read

      覆盖:
      toString 在类中 Object
      返回:
      the CSV string representation

    • fromString

      public static Notification fromString(String line)
      Parses a CSV string to create a Notification object.
      参数:
      line - the CSV string to parse
      返回:
      the parsed Notification, or null if the line format is invalid
